diagrams.title: Factorial Calculation Tree
diagrams.description: Shows how factorials build up: 5! = 5 × 4!, and 4! = 4 × 3! creating a tree structure
diagrams.purpose: Visualize recursive nature of factorial and why 0! = 1

diagrams.title: Permutation vs Combination Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Flowchart to decide whether to use permutation or combination
diagrams.purpose: Quick decision guide for problem solving

diagrams.title: Circular Seating Arrangement
diagrams.description: Shows n people around a circle with one person fixed
elements: For n=5: fix A, arrange B,C,D,E in 4! = 24 ways
diagrams.purpose: Understand why circular arrangements use (n-1)! instead of n!

diagrams.title: Inclusion-Exclusion Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Three-set Venn diagram showing overlap regions
elements: Formula: |A∪B∪C| = sum singles - sum doubles + triple
